name: KPM Holding Limited
summary: KPM Holding Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the design, fabrication, installation, and maintenance of signage and related products in Singapore. The company offers its products in the public sector for roads, education institutions, public housing flats/compounds, defense compound, airport and national parks, and others; and private sector for commercial and industrial buildings, private residential buildings, hospitals, and fast food chains. It also provides subcontracting services for fitting-out work to commercial premises and residential developments, as well as renovation services for premises. KPM Holding Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Singapore.
